title: Language Change - Earbuds/Headsets are up to date and smart Charge Chase/Stand is out of date
scenario: Language change DFU fails to update smart charge case/stand firmware after app language switch on multi-component device
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and connect to a multi-component device (e.g., earbuds with charge case or headset with charge stand) where all components are on outdated firmware.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
3. Change the language setting to a new language.
5. Observe the software update screen appears.
6. Wait for the language change DFU (Device Firmware Update) to complete.
7. After completion, verify that all components (earbuds/headset, charge case/stand) are updated to the latest firmware version.
8. Check that the language on the smart charge case/stand has changed to the newly selected language.
expected: After completing the language change DFU, all components are updated to the latest firmware version, and the language on the smart charge case/stand changes accordingly.
